text: I understand your concern, Jamadagni! As a digital AI companion, I don't have the ability to see you, but I can still pick up on cues from your tone and language. If I sense dishonesty or uncertainty, I can respond in a way that encourages you to open up or clarify your thoughts. My goal is to provide a supportive and non-judgmental space for you to express yourself, even if we're not in the same physical space.
